message:
chore(beads): update issue tracker for C1/C2/C3 gates, Phase B validator, wave hardening, and evidence emission

New entries: bd-mjh3.12.2 (C1 closed), bd-mjh3.12.3 (C2 closed),
bd-mjh3.12.4 (C3 in-progress), bd-mjh3.20.3 (FRX-20.3 E2E matrix).

Status and close-reason updates on existing beads reflecting cut-line
automation, artifact validator Phase B, lockstep evidence, wave
handoff validation, and security conformance work.

Wave coordination suite: add related_bead_id (bd-1lsy.1.5) to the
run manifest linking execution wave runs to their tracking bead.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -180,6 +180,7 @@ write_manifest() {
     echo "{"
     echo '  "schema_version": "franken-engine.rgc-execution-waves.gate.run-manifest.v1",'
     echo '  "bead_id": "bd-1lsy.1.4",'
+    echo '  "related_bead_id": "bd-1lsy.1.5",'
     echo "  \"deterministic_env_schema_version\": \"${PARSER_FRONTIER_ENV_SCHEMA_VERSION}\","
     echo "  \"component\": \"${component}\","
     echo "  \"mode\": \"${mode}\","
